CustomField.formula: IF(ispickval(cfp_implementationtype__c,'bre') || ispickval(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'flexcard') || ispickval(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'flow') || ispickval(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'omniscript') || ispickval(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Data Raptor') || ispickval(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Document Template') || ispickval(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Exp Builder') || ispickval(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Data Processing Engine') || ispickval(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Screen Flow'), IF(cfp_is_API_Call__c, 2, 1), 0)
CustomField.label: isLowCode
